ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-20-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-27-2006 Continued To Oct-20-06 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 612

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Sauceda.
Parviz Darabi, Esq. for Plaintiff: Maria Del Rosario Zepeda Gamez, present with Spanish Interpreter: Angie Mendez.
Interpreter and Plaintiff were sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Hugo Carranza ind. and dba Neat & Clean as follows:
Damages $18,240.00
Statutory Penalties $6,430.00
Attorney's Fees $2,940.00
Costs $429.00 for a total of $28,039.00
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2005 Continued To Feb-14-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
